title: Upon Eeles. Epig.
content:
Eeles winds and turns, and cheats and steals; yet Eeles
    Driving these sharking trades, is out at heels.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Eeles. Epig.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
